docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, JULIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES GROUP INC. $1,881.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,971.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-09-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES GROUP INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2026 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-21-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-21-2026 BY JUDGE STEVEN MURPHY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JULIA MARTINEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES GROUP INC. IS PRESENT. APPEARING IN COURT FOR THE DEFENDANT IS CAREN WATSON. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, JULIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES GROUP INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
